buildSummary: On-field Cosmos striker—tight rotations and crit-friendly modules make combat feel like a dance.

diskSets.name: The Rain That Shook the World (S)
diskSets.note: A versatile damage Arc that suits strikers who like clear burst moments.

diskSets.name: First Step to Success (A)
diskSets.note: A dependable early Arc while you work toward fancier sets.

modules.name: S-tier Module line
modules.note: Attack and crit stats keep burst moments feeling sharp.

modules.name: A-tier Module fallback
modules.note: Attack and cycle rate are fine placeholders while better pieces arrive.

skillPriority.scales: Largest burst spike and carry conversion.
Core DPS loop and cycle trigger pressure.
Swap burst contribution and utility damage.
Fill damage while waiting for key cooldowns.

farming.name: Esper EXP materials
farming.tip: Spend daily stamina here first until your main striker reaches the next ascension cap.

farming.name: Weapon/Arc upgrade mats
farming.tip: Farm on days matching your Arc upgrade route before side content.

farming.name: Module enhancement chips
farming.tip: Save module farming for after basics—modules matter most once your core team is settled.
